positive: A mystical, stylized composition featuring a cluster of bioluminescent celestial flora and fauna, suspended in a void of deep indigo and midnight blue. The main elements should be highly contrasting silhouettes—detailed, elegant outlines of glowing moon moths, curled cosmic vines, and oversized stylized leaves, highlighted with ethereal cyan, deep emerald, and shimmering gold. Use dramatic, volumetric lighting that emphasizes clean edges and strong contrast against the dark background. The art style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and delicate Japanese woodblock printing, suitable for center-chest apparel printing. Full-bleed, highly symmetrical, central focus.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad drawing, low quality, grainy, messy, realistic photography, gradient mess, jpeg artifacts
